prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to the governance and operational framework of the Health Research Authority (HRA) and the Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC) in England, as governed by the Care Act 2014. It does not apply to Scotland, which has its own distinct health governance structures and a separate legal framework.
